zh.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth II FitzHugh於大約1422年出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，她的父親William FitzHugh25歲，母親Lady Margaret Willoughby29歲。她於1434年10月28日與Sir Ralph Greystoke在英國英格蘭波藍德格斯托可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年3月20日在英國波藍德格斯托可享年47歲。

zh-hans.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth II FitzHugh于大约1422年出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，她的父亲William FitzHugh25岁，母亲Lady Margaret Willoughby29岁。她于1434年10月28日与Sir Ralph Greystoke在英国英格兰波藍德格斯托可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1468年3月20日在英国波藍德格斯托可享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth II FitzHugh was born about 1422, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, her father, William FitzHugh, was 25 and her mother, Lady Margaret Willoughby, was 29. She married Sir Ralph Greystoke on 28 October 1434, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 20 March 1468, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth II FitzHugh est née environ 1422, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William FitzHugh, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Willoughby, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Greystoke le 28 octobre 1434, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mars 1468, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth II FitzHugh um 1422 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzHugh 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Willoughby 29. Sie hat am 28. Oktober 1434 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Sir Ralph Greystoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. März 1468 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Greystoke, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth II FitzHugh è nata il circa 1422 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William FitzHugh, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Willoughby, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Greystoke il 28 ottobre 1434, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1468, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth II FitzHughが約1422年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父William FitzHughは25歳，母Lady Margaret Willoughbyは29歳であった。1434年10月28日にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクでSir Ralph Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1468年3月20日にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth II FitzHugh(이)가 대략 1422년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzHugh(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Willoughby(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1434년 10월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 Sir Ralph Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 3월 20일 영국 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: Ravensworth, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth II FitzHugh nasceu aproximadamente 1422, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzHugh, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Willoughby, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Greystoke em 28 de outubro de 1434, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de março de 1468, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth II FitzHugh родилась около 1422 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William FitzHugh было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Willoughby, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Greystoke 28 октября 1434 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 марта 1468 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth II FitzHugh nació aproximadamente 1422, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzHugh, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Willoughby, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Ralph Greystoke el 28 de octubre de 1434, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1468, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
